description: 暖色杂志风 - 栗色 + 米白 + 宋体,温厚的长文阅读感,适合观点 / 随笔 / 生活随笔

styles.body: font-family: 'Noto Serif SC', 'Songti SC', 'Source Han Serif SC', 'PingFang SC', serif; font-size: 15.5px; color: #3a2e26; line-height: 1.9; letter-spacing: 0.5px; word-spacing: 2px; padding: 20px 22px; background: #fbf7f0;
styles.h1: font-size: 23px; font-weight: 700; color: #5a2f1a; text-align: center; margin: 38px 0 26px; padding: 0 0 16px 0; letter-spacing: 2px; line-height: 1.45; border-bottom: 1px solid #c9a27d;
styles.h2: font-size: 18px; font-weight: 700; color: #5a2f1a; margin: 38px 0 20px; padding: 4px 0 10px 0; border-bottom: 2px solid #c9a27d; line-height: 1.5;
styles.h3: font-size: 16px; font-weight: 700; color: #7a4e3b; margin: 28px 0 12px; padding: 0 0 0 12px; border-left: 3px solid #c9a27d; letter-spacing: 0.5px;
styles.p: margin: 18px 0; text-indent: 0; text-align: justify; color: #3a2e26; line-height: 1.95;
styles.blockquote: margin: 26px 0; padding: 20px 24px; background: #f4ead8; border-left: 4px solid #c9a27d; color: #5a4636; font-size: 14.5px; border-radius: 0 6px 6px 0; line-height: 1.9; font-style: italic;
styles.img: max-width: 100%; height: auto; border-radius: 4px; margin: 26px auto; display: block; box-shadow: 0 6px 20px rgba(90,47,26,0.08);
styles.code_inline: background: #f4ead8; color: #8b4513; padding: 2px 8px; border-radius: 3px; font-size: 13px; font-family: 'Menlo', 'Consolas', monospace;
styles.code_block: background: #2d1f15; color: #f4ead8; padding: 16px 18px; border-radius: 6px; font-size: 12.5px; line-height: 1.65; font-family: 'Menlo', 'Consolas', monospace; overflow-x: auto; white-space: pre; margin: 24px 0; -webkit-overflow-scrolling: touch; -moz-tab-size: 2; tab-size: 2; font-variant-ligatures: none; -webkit-font-smoothing: antialiased;
styles.ol: margin: 20px 0; padding-left: 0; list-style: none; counter-reset: list;
styles.li_bullet: color: #c9a27d; font-weight: 700; font-size: 13px; display: inline-block; min-width: 16px; margin-right: 8px; text-align: left;
styles.li_number: color: #8b4513; font-weight: 700; font-size: 14px; min-width: 22px; display: inline-block; margin-right: 10px;
styles.hr: border: none; height: 1px; background: linear-gradient(to right, transparent, #c9a27d, transparent); margin: 40px 0;
styles.a: color: #8b4513; text-decoration: none; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(139,69,19,0.4);
styles.table: width: 100%; border-collapse: collapse; margin: 24px 0; font-size: 14px; border: 1px solid #e8d9c0; table-layout: fixed; word-break: break-word;
styles.th: background: #c9a27d; color: #2d1f15; padding: 10px 12px; text-align: left; font-weight: 700; font-size: 12.5px; word-break: break-word; line-height: 1.5;
styles.td: padding: 10px 8px; border-bottom: 1px solid #f0e4d0; color: #3a2e26; font-size: 13px; word-break: break-word; line-height: 1.55;
styles.caption: font-size: 12.5px; color: #9c8877; text-align: center; margin-top: 12px; letter-spacing: 0.5px; font-style: italic;
styles.section_divider: text-align: center; color: #c9a27d; letter-spacing: 12px; font-size: 14px; margin: 36px 0; user-select: none;

list_style.label: A · 栗色大字
list_style.num_container: display: inline-block; color: #7a3a28; font-family: 'Georgia','Times New Roman',serif; font-weight: 400; font-size: 24px; font-style: italic; margin-right: 10px; min-width: 24px; line-height: 1; vertical-align: -3px;
list_style.bullet_container: display: inline-block; color: #7a3a28; font-family: 'Georgia',serif; font-size: 16px; margin-right: 10px; font-weight: 700;
